extract: The Scarlet Book (Japanese: スカーレットブック Scarlet Book) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IX. It is exclusive to Pokémon Scarlet. Its counterpart in Pokémon Violet is the Violet Book. It is a written account of the Area Zero Expedition's journey into the Great Crater of Paldea and what they found there. According to Professor Raifort, while it was initially very popular, reception towards it eventually soured, with the public claiming the great treasures and bizarre creatures in Area Zero were too fantastical to possibly be real, eventually being seen as nothing more than fiction. A copy of the book can be read in the reception area of Naranja Academy on one of the shelves immediately to the right of the entrance.
